error_signature: Credential to connect with in the Puppeteer node
title: Missing credentials for Puppeteer node
symptom: The Puppeteer node prompts for credentials, indicating that it cannot connect without them.
not_this_if: Credentials are already configured in the node settings
root_cause: The Puppeteer node requires an n8n API key to function correctly. This key is necessary for the node to communicate with the n8n server and manage browser interactions effectively.
fix_steps: Navigate to the Puppeteer node settings in your workflow
Enter your n8n API key and base URL
agent_instruction: Configure the Puppeteer node with the required n8n API credentials.
